utterances.speaker: Boy in the Cape
utterances.text: You are a mean old woman .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! Wait no ! Shut up ... I mean do not cry ! Let me get my checkbook !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look honey , you do not have to do this , okay ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is the strength you have inside that means the most to me .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are loyal , you are honest , and you have integrity !

emotion_cause.span: 5_You are loyal , you are honest , and you have integrity !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is the kind of strength that I want in the man that I love !

emotion_cause.span: 5_You are loyal , you are honest , and you have integrity !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That means nothing to me . Come on !
